item.title: Biomerieux Inc: VITEK 2 AST-N447 TEST KIT Product reference 424620 Recall
item.product: VITEK 2 AST-N447 TEST KIT Product reference 424620
item.summary: Potential for false resistant carbapenem and/or cephalosporin results when analyzing samples with kits from affected lot that have pouch foil fractures. Product details: VITEK 2 AST-N447 TEST KIT Product reference 424620
item.affectedPeople: International distribution to the countries of Belgium and the Netherlands.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
